meta.author: New Session #1 — adversarial QA / validation gate (Opus 4.8)
meta.role: Independent adversarial gatekeeper. 'final_ready' from the fleet is treated as ready_for_validation, never final truth. No DB/LEDGER/PROGRESS/ownership_tier writes from this session.

validator_handshake.root_cause: The fleet candidate schema (gate_status, evidence_basis values structural_only/affiliated_dso_field/institutional_match/ao_reach/provider_surnames) does NOT match the validator's required fields (status) or VALID_BASES (locator/web_verified/ein_cluster/ao_cluster/name_chain/intel_dossier/structural/none). The validator chokes on field names before it can assess any evidence.
validator_handshake.consequence: The validator CANNOT currently gate this file. A translation shim (fleet vocab -> validator vocab) or a fleet-runner change is REQUIRED before ANY row is consolidated. Evidence-quality gating in this report was therefore performed MANUALLY against the user's gates.

mapping_needed.note: ARTIFACT_BASES require evidence_artifacts; URL_BASES require evidence_urls. Many fleet rows carry neither in the validator's expected field names.

systematic_findings: HANDSHAKE BLOCKER: validator rejects the whole file on schema (199 errors). Reconcile vocab before consolidating anything.

AO-REACH-ALONE: #13 (Hoffman) and #33 (Mohammed) rest solely on ao_reach with no multi-location OWNERSHIP corroboration; #11 (Yang) corroborated only by directory listings. Per user rule these are candidate-grade, not final.

DENTIST-OWNED GROUPS MIS-TAGGED AS DSO (inflates the DSO/PE-only headline): #22 Webster (->dentist_multi), #23 & #32 Precision/Randy Chang (->dentist_multi); #12 1st Family, #54 Secure carry pe_backed=false with no MSO/PE proof (T3-vs-T5 ambiguous).

FAMILY PRACTICES MIS-TAGGED AS single_loc_group (inflates the Consolidated headline): #72 Gasior (siblings) and #55 Rendon (father+son) are DB ec=family_practice; same surname != '2+ unrelated dentists'. The 6-tier model lacks a family bucket — escalate.
PE_BACKED INCONSISTENCY on Dental Dreams rows (#29, #34, #71): pe_backed=false despite naming a capital sponsor; reconcile the flag.
BRAND-NAME COLLISION RISK: #9 'Sonrisa Dental' (Debossu) vs the CDCA-affiliated 'Sonrisa' DSO in project history — DB shows no affiliation; low risk but negative-confirm before final.

DATA-QUALITY / GEOGRAPHY: #7 Lee Dental city=ORLAND PARK but zip=60647 (likely mis-ZIP'd, denominator scope); #62 practice_name literally 'Chicago Il' (placeholder); #42 evidence URL (Wilson) does not match DB address (Clark St).

(was already candidate) stealth_dso via co-location trap; DB affiliated_dso=None — reject.
